name: test-lottery
description: Lottery — players buy tickets with in-game currency and a daily draw picks a weighted random winner. Prize pool grows with each ticket purchase.

profitMargin.description: Fraction of the pot the server keeps (0 = no server fee, 0.99 = server keeps 99%)

maxTicketsPerPlayer.description: Maximum tickets a single player can hold for one draw

minimumParticipants.description: Minimum number of unique players required to proceed with the draw

announceTicketPurchases.description: Whether to broadcast ticket purchases to all players

rolloverOnCancel.description: When true, pot rolls over to the next draw instead of refunding players on cancellation

permissions.description: Allows a player to buy lottery tickets
Allows a player to view their current ticket count

buy-ticket.helpText: Buy one or more lottery tickets for the current draw. Usage: buyticket <amount>

lottery-info.helpText: Shows the current pot, participant count, total tickets, and ticket price for the upcoming draw.

next-draw.description: See when the next lottery draw is
next-draw.helpText: Shows how long until the next lottery draw at midnight UTC.

view-tickets.description: View your current lottery ticket count
view-tickets.helpText: Shows how many tickets you currently hold for the upcoming draw.

draw-lottery.description: Daily lottery draw at midnight UTC — picks a weighted random winner from ticket holders
